summary: Summary: Speaker1 opens the conversation excited, sharing news; Speaker2 responds excited and they quickly express mutual happiness about the idea of living together. Speaker1 initially shows happiness about staying in town but shifts to neutral when discussing living with his mom. Speaker2 remains excited throughout, pushing to get a place together. Both grow excited imagining living near the U.S.C. campus, parties, and social life; Speaker2 briefly reveals sadness about not attending USC (calling it "pathetic"), but they soon joke about working instead. They end by planning to apartment-shop tomorrow, both excited and in a state of happiness overall.
